author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Sleep disruption is treated as evidence that a position exceeds psychological and financial capacity; balanced allocation, avoiding casual averaging down, and avoiding leverage are presented as safeguards.

author: [[冰冰小美]]

author: [[冰冰小美]]
nodes.rationale: Positions are built gradually on the left side using downside thinking and a multi-year view; right-side additions are avoided unless strict conditions across valuation, liquidity, macro data, and market behavior are met.
